narrative:
Marion Twp township has 1,628 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.5 percentage points.
